revision.comment: Bot: mark 4 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:日帰り入浴施設]] {{Source citation|date=October 2019|qq=}} [[File:Togo onsen01nt3200.jpg|thumb|280px|Example of a large facility:
{{ill|Tōgō Onsen|en|Tōgō Onsen|qid=Q11528535|lt=Togo Onsen|1=Tōgō Onsen}} YuaShisu Togo Ryuhokaku]] '''Day-Use Bathing Facilities''' (日帰り入浴施設) are a type of {{ill|Public bathing|en|Public bathing|qid=Q785952|lt=Public Bathhouse|1=Public bathing}} designed for {{ill|Bathing|en|Bathing|qid=Q327651|lt=Bathing|1=Bathing}} without involving {{ill|Lodging|en|Lodging|qid=Q5056668|lt=accommodation|1=Lodging}}. Facilities that primarily use {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=Onsen|1=Onsen}} water are often also called '''Day-Use Onsen Facilities'''. == Overview == The range of facilities spans from small establishments consisting only of a bath – resembling an extension of a {{ill|Communal hot springs|de|Gemeinschaftsbad|ja|共同浴場|zh|公共浴场|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Communal hot springs|qq=|lt=communal hot spring}} used in daily routines – to large complexes that, in addition to a variety of bathtubs, include relaxation areas and dining services. Such large facilities increasingly emphasize comprehensive {{ill|Relaxation (psychology)|en|Relaxation (psychology)|qid=Q3935810|lt=Relaxation|1=Relaxation (psychology)}} and {{ill|Entertainment|de|Unterhaltung|ja|娯楽|zh|娱乐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entertainment|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=エンターテインメント|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=エンターテインメント|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=エンターテインメント|1=Entertainment|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q173799}} (amusement) offerings through the facility space, much like the concept seen in {{ill|Super Sentō|de|Super-Sento|ja|スーパー銭湯|1=Super Sentō|zh|超级澡堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Super Sentō|13=User:Immanuelle/Super Sentō|qq=}}. In many cases the term is used especially for facilities that make use of hot spring water. However, in areas where natural hot springs do not emerge, some establishments use boiled {{ill|Well|en|Well|qid=Q43483|lt=Well|1=Well}} water derived from {{ill|Mineral spring|en|Mineral spring|qid=Q1365924|lt=Mineral Spring|1=Mineral spring}}, or even substitute with {{ill|Seawater|en|Seawater|qid=Q184395|lt=Seawater|1=Seawater}} (or more precisely, {{ill|Marine Spring|de|Meeresquelle|ja|海洋泉|zh|海洋泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marine Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500316|1=Marine Spring}}). In addition, some urban facilities – and even the large public baths of {{ill|Hotel|de|Business-Hotel|ja|ビジネスホテル|zh|商务酒店|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Business Hotel|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ホテル|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ホテル|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ホテル|1=Hotel|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q27686}} chains or {{ill|Health club|en|Health club|qid=Q1065656|lt=Fitness Club|1=Health club}}s – have begun mixing {{ill|Bath Additive|en|Bath bomb|qid=Q2869238|lt=Bath Additive|1=Bath Additive}} (such as {{ill|Sodium|en|Sodium|qid=Q658|lt=Sodium|1=Sodium}} and {{ill|Sulfur|en|Sulfur|qid=Q682|lt=Sulfur|1=Sulfur}}) into boiled tap water or dissolving mineral-like ingredients (for example, {{ill|Radium|en|Radium|qid=Q1128|lt=Radium|1=Radium}} and other components) within a {{ill|Boiler|en|Boiler|qid=Q3195517|lt=Boiler|1=Boiler}} to produce what is marketed as an '''{{ill|Artificial Hot Spring|de|Künstliche Onsen|ja|人工温泉|1=Artificial Hot Spring|zh|人工温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Artificial Hot Spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Artificial Hot Spring|qq=}}'''. Such facilities are gaining ground around urban areas and near {{ill|Amusement park|en|Amusement park|qid=Q194195|lt=Theme Park|1=Amusement park}}s. Until the {{ill|1980s|en|1980s|qid=Q34644|lt=1980s|1=1980s}}, hot springs were considered to occur only in limited mountainous regions. However, since the {{ill|1990s|en|1990s|qid=Q34653|lt=1990s|1=1990s}}, advancements in {{ill|Boring (earth)|en|Boring (earth)|qid=Q12177444|lt=Borehole drilling|1=Boring (earth)}} ({{ill|Digging|en|Digging|qid=Q4232202|lt=Excavation|1=Digging}}) technology have enabled drilling to depths of roughly 1,500 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}} to 2,000 m, making it possible for hot springs to emerge even in the {{ill|Plain|en|Plain|qid=Q160091|lt=Plain|1=Plain}} areas. Since the {{ill|2000s|en|2000s|qid=Q35024|lt=2000s|1=2000s}}, there has been a significant rise in the opening of new facilities in urban settings. In rural regions, it is common to develop hot springs as part of a municipal {{ill|Community building|de|Stadtbelebung|ja|町おこし|zh|城镇振兴|lt=Town Revitalization|lt_ja=町興し|lt_de=Stadtbelebung|lt_zh=城镇振兴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Town Revitalization|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=地域おこし|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=地域おこし|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=地域おこし|1=Community building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5154924}} strategy and to operate bathing facilities on a public ({{ill|Public Enterprise|de|Öffentlich|ja|公営|zh|公营|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Public|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=公営企業|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=公営企業|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=公営企業|1=Public Enterprise|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391959}}) basis, whereas in cities such facilities are also established by dedicated enterprises nationwide or as a component of real estate redevelopment by general companies within the leisure industry (for instance, attached to {{ill|Amusement park|en|Amusement park|qid=Q194195|lt=Theme Park|1=Amusement park}}s or {{ill|Pachinko Parlor|de|Pachinko-Laden|ja|パチンコ店|zh|柏青哥店|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pachinko Parlor|1=Pachinko Parlor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11328994|lt=Pachinko Parlors}}). Facilities of this kind are found throughout various hot spring regions in the country – and in many cases there exist hot spring resorts consisting solely of day-use bathing facilities. This pattern is especially evident with new developments of {{ill|Hot Spring Source|de|Quelle des Onsen|ja|源泉|1=Spring Mouth|zh|温泉源|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Source|13=User:Immanuelle/Spring Mouth|qq=}}. Examples include facilities built adjacent to {{ill|Train station|en|Train station|qid=Q55488|lt=Railway Station|1=Train station}}, along {{ill|Controlled-access highway|en|Controlled-access highway|qid=Q46622|lt=Highway|1=Controlled-access highway}} {{ill|service area|de|Raststätte|ja|サービスエリア|zh|服务区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Service Area|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q60985097|lt=service areas|1=service area}}, or at {{ill|Roadside station|en|Roadside station|qid=Q1187691|lt=Roadside Station|1=Roadside station}}s; there are even cases where former {{ill|Ryokan|en|Ryokan|qid=Q562930|lt=Ryokan|1=Ryokan}}s have discontinued their lodging operations to function purely as day-use bathing facilities. In recent years, the number of publicly operated day-use bathing facilities has also been increasing. == Major Day-Use Bathing Facilities == {{Section stub|qq=}} * (Excludes facilities that are primarily oriented toward accommodation, {{ill|Health land|de|Gesundheitland|ja|健康ランド|1=Health land|zh|健康乐园|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Health land|13=User:Immanuelle/Health land|qq=}}, typical {{ill|Sentō|en|Sentō|qid=Q1046648|lt=Sento|1=Sentō}} and {{ill|Communal Bath|de|Gemeinschaftsbad|ja|共同浴場|1=Communal hot springs|1=Communal hot springs|1=Communal hot springs|zh|公共浴场|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Communal Bath|13=User:Immanuelle/Communal hot springs|qq=}}, or those offering only {{ill|Ashiyu|en|Ashiyu|qid=Q725522|lt=Foot Bath|1=Ashiyu}} or {{ill|Ganban'yoku|en|Ganban'yoku|qid=Q5520526|lt=Ganban'yoku|1=Ganban'yoku}} services). Note that facilities whose primary focus is day-use bathing yet also provide lodging are included below, as are {{ill|Super Sentō|de|Super-Sento|ja|スーパー銭湯|1=Super Sentō|zh|超级澡堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Super Sentō|13=User:Immanuelle/Super Sentō|qq=}}. === Publicly Operated === ==== Kanto Region ==== ; Tochigi Prefecture * {{ill|Yunishigawa Mizunosato|de|Nikko City Yunasukawa Water Village|ja|日光市湯西川水の郷|zh|日光市汤西川水之乡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikko City Yunasukawa Water Village|1=Yunishigawa Mizunosato|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q111086202}}{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.nikko-kankou.org/spot/52/|title=Yunasukawa Water Village|work=Nikko Travel Navi|publisher=Nikko City Tourism Association|accessdate=2022-03-04|qq=}} * {{ill|Maoka Itagashira Onsen|de|Maoka Itagashira Onsen|ja|真岡井頭温泉|zh|真冈井头温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maoka Itagashira Onsen|1=Maoka Itagashira Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q111702384}}{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=https://www.tochigiji.or.jp/spot/s4990|title=Maoka Itagashira Onsen|work=Tochigi Travel Net|publisher=Tochigi Prefecture Tourism & Product Association|date=2022-02-02|accessdate=2022-04-24|qq=}} ; Saitama Prefecture * {{ill|Sawarabi Hot Spring|de|Sawarabi Hot Spring|ja|さわらびの湯|zh|Sawarabi Hot Spring|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawarabi Hot Spring|1=Sawarabi Hot Spring|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11268515}} ; Kanagawa Prefecture * {{ill|Tsurumaki Onsen|de|Tsurumaki Onsen|ja|鶴巻温泉|zh|鹤卷温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurumaki Onsen|1=Tsurumaki Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11676016}} – Kobo's Village Bath * {{ill|Fujino Onsen|de|Fujino Onsen|ja|藤野温泉|zh|藤野温泉|lt=Fujino Yamanami Onsen|lt_ja=藤野やまなみ温泉|lt_de=Fujino Yamanami Onsen|lt_zh=藤野温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujino Onsen|1=Fujino Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625026}} ({{ill|Sagamihara|en|Sagamihara|qid=Q209779|lt=Sagamihara City|1=Sagamihara}} {{ill|Midori-ku, Sagamihara|en|Midori-ku, Sagamihara|qid=Q1132502|lt=Midori Ward|1=Midori-ku, Sagamihara}}) ==== Chubu Region ==== ; Aichi Prefecture * Inuyama Municipal Health Center “Sara Sakura” * {{ill|Nagakute Onsen Gozarasse|de|Nagakute Onsen Gozarasse|ja|長久手温泉ござらっせ|zh|长久手温泉ござらっせ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagakute Onsen Gozarasse|1=Nagakute Onsen Gozarasse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11651433}} ; Hyōgo Prefecture * {{ill|Arima Onsen|en|Arima Onsen|qid=Q4790673|lt=Arima Onsen|1=Arima Onsen}}{{ill|Kin no Yu|de|Kan no Yu|ja|金の湯|zh|金之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan no Yu|1=Kin no Yu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11646262}} * Arima Onsen {{ill|Gin no Yu|de|Gin no Yu|ja|銀の湯|zh|银之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gin no Yu|1=Gin no Yu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11649924}} * Within {{ill|Roadside station Koube Fruit Flower Park Oosawa|de|Kobe City Fruit & Flower Park|ja|神戸市立フルーツ・フラワーパーク|zh|神户市立水果花卉公园|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobe City Fruit & Flower Park|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=道の駅神戸フルーツ・フラワーパーク大沢|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=道の駅神戸フルーツ・フラワーパーク大沢|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=道の駅神戸フルーツ・フラワーパーク大沢|1=Roadside station Koube Fruit Flower Park Oosawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11589937}}, Natural Hot Spring Akane no Yu === Privately Operated === ==== Multi-Regional Chain Operators ==== * {{ill|Gokurakuyu|de|Gokurakuyu|ja|極楽湯|zh|极乐汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokurakuyu|1=Gokurakuyu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11541499}} (nationwide) * {{ill|Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|de|Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|ja|大江戸温泉物語|zh|大江户温泉物语|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|1=Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q863399}} * {{ill|Manyo Club|de|Manyo Club|ja|万葉倶楽部|zh|万叶俱乐部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manyo Club|1=Manyo Club|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11353911}} * {{ill|Ryusenji-no-yu|de|Ryusenji no Yu|ja|竜泉寺の湯|zh|龙泉寺之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryusenji no Yu|1=Ryusenji-no-yu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11598337}} * {{ill|Raku no Yu|de|Raku no Yu|ja|楽の湯|zh|乐之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raku no Yu|1=Raku no Yu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11266836}} * {{ill|Korona World|de|Corona no Yu|ja|コロナの湯|zh|科罗娜温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Corona no Yu|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=コロナワールド|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=コロナワールド|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=コロナワールド|1=Korona World|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11302883}} * {{ill|Koshidaka Holdings|de|Maneki no Yu|ja|まねきの湯|zh|招财温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maneki no Yu|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=コシダカホールディングス|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=コシダカホールディングス|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=コシダカホールディングス|1=Koshidaka Holdings|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11302042}} * {{ill|Dormy Inn|de|Dormy Inn|ja|ドーミーイン|zh|多米因|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dormy Inn|1=Dormy Inn|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11323504}} (Myōjin no Yu, Kodai Ren Monogatari, etc.) * {{ill|Route Inn|de|Hotel Route Inn|ja|ホテルルートイン|zh|酒店鲁特因|lt=Route Inn|lt_ja=ルートイン|lt_de=Route Inn|lt_zh=Route Inn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hotel Route Inn|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ルートインジャパン|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ルートインジャパン|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ルートインジャパン|1=Route Inn|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11337912}} (Grantea) * {{ill|Q135491453|de|One Day Spa|ja|ワンデイ・スパ|zh|一日水疗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One Day Spa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135491453}} ({{ill|2009|en|2009|qid=Q1996|lt=2009|1=2009}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|qid=Q234510|lt=Heisei 21|1=Heisei era}}) filed for bankruptcy) * {{ill|Daiwa System|de|Yamato no Yu|ja|大和システム|zh|大和系统|lt=Yamato no Yu|lt_ja=やまとの湯|lt_de=Yamato no Yu|lt_zh=Yamato no Yu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato no Yu|1=Daiwa System|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11433385}} (closed in {{ill|2015|en|2015|qid=Q2002|lt=2015|1=2015}} (Heisei 27)) ==== Kanto Region ==== * {{ill|Yuraku no Sato|de|Yuraku no Sato|ja|湯楽の里|zh|汤乐之里|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuraku no Sato|1=Yuraku no Sato|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11563603}}・Kikuraku-ri ({{ill|Kantō region|en|Kantō region|qid=Q132480|lt=Kanto|1=Kantō region}}, extensive coverage) * {{ill|Yukaisoukai|de|Yukaisoukai|ja|湯快爽快|zh|汤快爽快|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukaisoukai|1=Yukaisoukai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11563566}} (operating in the {{ill|Minami Kantō|de|Süd-Kanto|ja|南関東|zh|南关东|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/South Kanto|1=Minami Kantō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1775108}} region) * {{ill|Ofuro-no-Ousama|de|Badekönig|ja|おふろの王様|zh|浴场之王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bath King|1=Ofuro-no-Ousama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11262379}} (operating in the South Kanto region) * {{ill|Q135500318|de|Yukemuri no Shō|ja|湯けむりの庄|zh|蒸汽温泉庄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukemuri no Shō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500318}}・{{ill|Q135500321|de|Yukemuri no Sato|ja|湯けむりの里|zh|蒸汽温泉里|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukemuri no Sato|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500321}} (operating in the South Kanto region) * {{ill|Kenbi no Yu|de|Kenbi no Yu|ja|健美の湯|zh|健美温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenbi no Yu|1=Kenbi no Yu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q109366148}} ; Tokyo Metropolis * {{ill|Granspa Hachioji|de|Granspa Hachioji|ja|グランスパ八王子|zh|Granspa八王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Granspa Hachioji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491454|1=Granspa Hachioji}} * {{ill|Big Fun Heiwajima|de|Big Fan Heiwajima|ja|ビッグファン平和島|zh|Big Fan平和岛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Big Fan Heiwajima|1=Big Fun Heiwajima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11330769}} * {{ill|Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|de|Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|ja|大江戸温泉物語|zh|大江户温泉物语|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|1=Ooedo Onsen Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q863399}} * {{ill|Kiniro-sai|de|Kiniro-sai|ja|季乃彩|zh|季乃彩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiniro-sai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500324|1=Kiniro-sai}} ({{ill|Inagi|en|Inagi|qid=Q317847|lt=Inagi City|1=Inagi}}) * {{ill|Murayama Onsen Katakuri no Yu|de|Murayama Onsen Katakuri no Yu|ja|村山温泉かたくりの湯|zh|村山温泉かたくりの汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murayama Onsen Katakuri no Yu|qid=Q135500326|1=Murayama Onsen Katakuri no Yu}} ; Saitama Prefecture * {{ill|Saitama Seikawadera Onsen|de|Saitama Seikawadera Onsen|ja|さいたま清河寺温泉|zh|埼玉清河寺温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Seikawadera Onsen|1=Saitama Seikawadera Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11267526}} * {{ill|Q135500328|de|Yumoto Group|ja|湯本グループ|zh|汤本集团|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yumoto Group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500328}} ({{ill|Gyoda Onsen|de|Gyoda Onsen|ja|行田温泉|zh|行田温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gyoda Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500330|1=Gyoda Onsen}} and {{ill|Shobi no Yu|de|Shobi no Yu|ja|茂美の湯|zh|茂美之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shobi no Yu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500333|1=Shobi no Yu}}) * Yuttari-en ({{ill|Hanyu Onsen|de|Hanyu Onsen|ja|羽生温泉|zh|羽生温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyu Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135490855|1=Hanyu Onsen}}) * {{ill|Natural Hot Spring Hanasaki no Yu|de|Natural Hot Spring Hanasaki no Yu|ja|天然温泉花咲の湯|zh|天然温泉花咲之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natural Hot Spring Hanasaki no Yu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493021|1=Natural Hot Spring Hanasaki no Yu}} ({{ill|Ageo|en|Ageo|qid=Q163888|lt=Ageo City|1=Ageo}}) ; Chiba Prefecture * {{ill|Tokyo Rakutenchi|de|Houten no Yu|ja|法典の湯|zh|法典之汤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Houten no Yu|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=東京楽天地|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=東京楽天地|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=東京楽天地|1=Tokyo Rakutenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11524930}} ({{ill|Funabashi|en|Funabashi|qid=Q271417|lt=Funabashi City|1=Funabashi}}, {{ill|Tokyo Rakutenchi|de|Tokyo Economy, {{ill|2013|en|2013|qid=Q1998|lt=2013|1=2013}}, {{ill|February 4|en|February 4|qid=Q2318|lt=February 4|1=February 4}}) === Adjacent to Roadside Service Facilities === {{See also|List of
